nearby_paragraphs: I have read and understood this Permit and shall undertake to work in accordance with all the conditions laid down in it.

Details of the work team 工作人員資料
I have read and understood this Permit and shall undertake to work in accordance with all the conditions laid down in it.
本人已細閱及明白許可證內容，並承諾於工作期間謹遵有關條款。
I certify that the work under this permit is completed. All workers, tools, equipment and material are cleared from the work area.
本人證明此許可證內所述之工作經已完成。全部工友、工具、儀器及物料已撤離工作地點。
